scan_output: Vulnerability sysctl_net_ipv6_conf_all_forwarding not found in single-rule scan (possibly fixed)

llm_verdict.message:
Perfect! The remediation is complete:

✅ **Runtime value**: `net.ipv6.conf.all.forwarding = 0` (already set)
✅ **Persistent configuration**: `/etc/sysctl.d/99-disable-ipv6-forwarding.conf` exists with `net.ipv6.conf.all.forwarding = 0`
✅ **Applied successfully**: `sysctl --system` confirmed the setting is active

The IPv6 forwarding is now disabled both at runtime and will persist across reboots.
